variants.title: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHSU70325 Suction Filter | Replaces the Filtration Group 72416706
variants.option1Value: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHSU70325 Suction Filter | Replaces the Filtration Group 72416706
variants.description: The MICROFIT® UltraGen III MFHSU70325 is the MICROFIT® approved replacement to the Filtration Group 72416706. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHSU70325
specifications: Style: Suction Filter, Media: Glass Fiber (Anti-Static), Efficiency 1: 10µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 12µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 79.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 63.5 mm, Length: 1040.5 mm, Seal Material: Viton, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber (Anti-Static), Flow Direction: IN-OUT, Seal: Viton

variants.title: Donaldson P573123 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Filtration Group 72416706
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P573123 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Filtration Group 72416706
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P573123 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge is designed to provide superior protection for your hydraulic system, effectively capturing contaminants to ensure clean fluid circulation. With high-quality filtration media, it extends equipment life, improves operational efficiency, and maintains fluid cleanliness even in the most demanding environments. Built for industrial, agricultural, and heavy-duty applications, this filter offers excellent dirt-holding capacity and flow efficiency. Its easy installation and maintenance help reduce downtime, making it a reliable choice for keeping hydraulic systems running smoothly.

variants.title: Filtrec U134G10V/ESD Suction Filter | Replaces the Filtration Group 72416706
variants.option1Value: Filtrec U134G10V/ESD Suction Filter | Replaces the Filtration Group 72416706
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec U134G10V/ESD. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the U134G10V/ESD provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
